welcome.title: Welcome to LIpsum Writer
welcome.description: A quick orientation to spaces and the home screen.

intro.title: Welcome
intro.body: LIpsum Writer is a writing workspace built around spaces — one space per project, paper, or book. Let's take a quick look around.

continue.title: Pick up where you left off
continue.body: Your most recently edited space is here. One click reopens it.

startSpace.title: Start something new
startSpace.body: Create a fresh space from a template — a thesis, a novel, an essay — and start writing in seconds.

writer.title: The writer's workspace
writer.description: A tour of the editor, sidebar, and top bar.

intro.title: The writing surface
intro.body: This is where you do the work. Let's look at the navigation, modes, and tools you'll use most.

spaceTitle.title: Space title
spaceTitle.body: Click the title to rename the space. The hover icon next to it opens its settings.

sections.title: Sections & documents
sections.body: Organize a space into sections, and sections into documents. Hover a section to add a new doc.

settings.title: Space settings
settings.body: Manage the template, sections, sharing, and deletion of this space.

modes.title: Read · Write · Split
modes.body: Switch between editing, reading, or a side-by-side view. Each doc remembers your last mode.

citations.title: Citations
citations.body: Open the citations panel to insert references while you write.

theme.title: Theme
theme.body: Light, dark, and high-contrast variants — pick one that suits your eyes.

editor.title: The editor
editor.body: A rich-text editor with markdown shortcuts, code blocks, and quotes. Start typing — your work autosaves locally.

intro.title: Your bibliography
intro.body: All references for a space live here. Import a BibTeX file or add entries by hand.

add.title: Add or import
add.body: Drop in a .bib file or paste BibTeX text. Duplicates are skipped automatically.

list.title: The list
list.body: Search, filter, and edit citations inline. From here you can also export the full bibliography.

intro.title: Think out loud
intro.body: BrainSpace is a freeform canvas for ideas — drop notes, connect them, and shape your thinking before you commit to prose.

addNote.title: Add a note
addNote.body: Drop a note of any kind onto the canvas. Drag to move, resize from the corners.

canvas.title: The canvas
canvas.body: Shift-click two notes to connect them. Click the background to deselect.
